title: [Let's Do Addon] ThrowableCheese
body:
THROW THE CHEEEEESE

![ASDFMovie guy throwing THE CHEESE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/875b75d71cba9f257d2dd5c21fa38dc5a0801a43.png)

THE Asdfmovie reference, now in your Minecraft !

Adds the ability to throw cheeses from [Let's Do] Meadow, Mozzarella from [Let's Do] Candlelight and Cheese from Ad Astra by sneaking + using the items.
Want to add other cheese variants ? You can do so by adding your items (can be any item, but cheese is funny) to the `throwablecheese:throwable` tag !
